answer: 💰 Your current **Wallet Balance** is shown in the sidebar. This includes your accumulated auto-payouts and recent earnings protection. You can withdraw this to your linked UPI/Bank account instantly!
📈 All payouts are **automatically pushed** when rainfall or traffic triggers are met. No manual claim needed! You can view your history in the Payouts tab.
📊 Your **Stability Score** represents your consistency in working during safe windows. High scores (above 80%) can help lower your future weekly premiums by up to 20%!
🚀 **PayNest** is an AI-powered income protection platform for gig workers. We use real-time weather and traffic data to automatically pay you when disruptions happen. Zero-touch, zero-claims!
🛡️ A **Safe Zone** is an area with minimal hazard risk right now. Working here helps you maintain your trust score and keeps your insurance costs low.
💰 Your **Weekly Premium** is dynamic—it adapts to your risk profile. If you work in safer zones and better weather, your premium for the next week will automatically decrease.
🆔 **Aadhaar Verification** is required for full protection. Click the 📄 button to upload your card. We'll securely extract your details and add **+4 points** to your Trust Score!
🌦️ We monitor rainfall and traffic levels in real-time. If rain exceeds 30mm or traffic congestion hits 80%, a payout is triggered automatically for covered users.
🔒 PayNest uses bank-grade security. Our ML models also detect fraud to ensure that honest workers get their payouts as fast as possible without any manual audits.
👋 Hello! I'm your PayNest Assistant. Ask me about your **balance**, **payouts**, **stability score**, or how to **verify your Aadhaar**!
